findings.description: Icon style requirement ('minimal line illustration', consistent stroke weight/rounded caps/single-color, must match stylistic approach') is a distinct hard constraint but has no corresponding rule in the group; only the color rule was extracted.

payload.description: New icons must use minimal line illustration style with consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, and single-color line work.

findings.description: Scale/contrast guidance for low-vision audiences, including embedded GENERAL default values (32x32px minimum render size in email, default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds), is entirely missing from the candidate rule set.

payload.description: Consider scale and contrast for low-vision audiences.

findings.description: The bracketed [GENERAL: ...] clause is a governance facet specifying concrete default values and channel scope (email) that must be preserved on any rule derived from this unit; currently no rule captures it at all, risking silent loss of these operational defaults.
